summary_one_line_zh: 工具接口、反馈语气与AI治理同时变重要
summary_one_line_en: Tool surfaces, user voice, and AI governance all shifted.

items.why_zh: 把信息架构暴露成插件点，说明 agent 产品的“可导航性”本身已是平台能力。
items.why_en: Exposes information architecture as a plugin surface; navigability is now platform capability.
items.so_what_zh: 检查你们的 agent UI：把高频动作抽成可插拔菜单/入口。
items.so_what_en: Audit your agent UI and extract high-frequency actions into pluggable entry points.

items.title_zh: 问题单必须用自己的话写
items.title_en: Bug reports need your own voice
items.why_zh: 这在提醒：AI 产品的反馈闭环要抗“代写”，否则诊断信号会被模型腔污染。
items.why_en: Feedback loops must resist AI-written reports or your diagnostics get polluted.
items.so_what_zh: 在报障表单加“原始观察/复现步骤/环境”三段分栏，禁止整段复制模型输出。
items.so_what_en: Split bug forms into raw observation, repro steps, and environment; disallow pasted model prose.

items.title_zh: 教廷把 AI 变成治理议题
items.why_zh: 这不是伦理鸡汤，而是高层叙事开始要求可解释、可控、以人优先的产品边界。
items.why_en: Not ethics fluff: executive narratives are demanding explainable, controllable, human-first product boundaries.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们的 AI 风险分级、人工兜底和拒答策略写进对外文档。
items.so_what_en: Document risk tiers, human override, and refusal policy in your external-facing docs.
